feedback.suggestions: Not that I can think of. But, I am not used to playing these kinds of games. The ones that I play the most are the hidden object kinds of games. So, I know I did poorly on these. Never the less, I did have fun!!
feedback.funCriteria: Basically I decided if a game was fun or not was trying to get the controls down pat and figuring out what controls did what. The easier ones where the ones that I could easily figure out the controls and do well in the game. Those were much more enjoyable than the ones I could not figure out the controls very well.
